email_body:
Beste team van Pulse Foundation,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de stage Community, Communication & Events. Uw focus op AI-gedreven communicatie sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring met SEO, GEO en AI-tools zoals ChatGPT en Claude.

In mijn huidige rol bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte content en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Daarnaast heb ik op mirook.com gestructureerde data en GEO-technieken toegepast om zichtbaarheid in AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Ik publiceer regelmatig op sociale media en ben vertrouwd met Canva, video-editing en Mailchimp.

Ik ben een gemotiveerde teamspeler met een creatieve en proactieve instelling. Mijn talenkennis (Engels, Turks, Nederlands B1) en flexibiliteit maken mij geschikt voor deze dynamische rol.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn ervaring in te zetten voor Pulse Foundation en tegelijkertijd te leren van uw AI-experts.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Pulse Foundation team,

I am very excited to apply for the Community, Communication & Events internship. Your focus on AI-driven communication aligns perfectly with my experience in SEO, GEO, and AI tools like ChatGPT and Claude.

In my current role at Episto, I handle on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and manage WordPress sites. On my own project mirook.com, I implemented structured data and GEO techniques to improve visibility in AI search engines. I regularly post on social media and am comfortable with Canva, video editing, and Mailchimp.

I am a motivated team player with a creative and proactive mindset. My language skills (English, Turkish, Dutch B1) and flexibility make me a good fit for this dynamic role.

I look forward to contributing to Pulse Foundation while learning from your AI experts.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste selectiecommissie,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Community, Communication & Events stage bij Pulse Foundation. Uw visie om AI in te zetten voor slimmere communicatie spreekt mij enorm aan, omdat ik dagelijks werk met AI-tools zoals ChatGPT, Claude en Canva AI.

In mijn huidige functie als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, het schrijven van keyword-gerichte blogcontent en het beheren van WordPress-sites. Ik gebruik SEMrush, Ahrefs en Google Analytics om prestaties te meten en te optimaliseren. Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com gestructureerde data (JSON-LD schema) en GEO-technieken toegepast om de vindbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Deze ervaring sluit direct aan bij uw vraag naar AI-ondersteunde contentcreatie en automatisering.

Uw vermelding van community management en sociale media is een sterk punt: ik publiceer regelmatig op LinkedIn en Instagram, en ik ben vertrouwd met het co-creëren van visuele content in Canva. Ook heb ik ervaring met video-editing (CapCut) en e-mailcampagnes (Mailchimp).

Ik ben een flexibele, proactieve teamspeler die snel nieuwe tools oppikt. Mijn talenkennis (Engels professioneel, Turks moedertaal, Nederlands B1) stelt mij in staat om in uw meertalige omgeving te werken. Ik ben gemotiveerd om mijn technische en creatieve vaardigheden in te zetten voor de missie van Pulse Foundation.

Ik hoop mijn motivatie en ervaring in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear selection committee,

I am very excited to apply for the Community, Communication & Events internship at Pulse Foundation. Your vision of using AI for smarter communication strongly appeals to me, as I work daily with AI tools like ChatGPT, Claude, and Canva AI.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, writing keyword-targeted blog content, and managing WordPress sites. I use SEMrush, Ahrefs, and Google Analytics to measure and optimize performance. On my own project mirook.com, I implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema) and GEO techniques to improve visibility in both traditional and AI search engines. This experience directly matches your need for AI-assisted content creation and automation.

Your emphasis on community management and social media is a strong point for me: I regularly post on LinkedIn and Instagram, and I am familiar with co-creating visual content in Canva. I also have experience with video editing (CapCut) and email campaigns (Mailchimp).

I am a flexible, proactive team player who quickly picks up new tools. My language skills (English professional, Turkish native, Dutch B1) enable me to work in your multilingual environment. I am motivated to apply my technical and creative skills to Pulse Foundation's mission.

I hope to further discuss my motivation and experience in an interview.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• Hands-on experience with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Canva AI) for content creation and automation
• Proven social media content creation and community management on LinkedIn, Instagram, and Facebook
• Skilled in WordPress, Canva, video editing (CapCut), and email campaigns (Mailchimp)
• SEO/GEO expertise including structured data and AI search optimization
• Trilingual: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1) – fits multilingual environment
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in AI-driven content creation, social media management, and digital communication. At Episto, I run on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and manage WordPress sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Canva AI) for drafting, captioning, and research. Skilled in social media publishing (LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook), community engagement, and content coordination. Quick to pick up new tools and platforms. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- AI & Automation: ChatGPT, Claude, Canva AI, AI-assisted content workflows
- Social Media & Community: LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook content publishing, community management, engagement
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building, Canva, video editing (CapCut)
- Email & Events: Mailchimp, newsletter campaigns, event coordination support
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
